ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Primary researcher responsible for the experiment */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the experiment */,
  "ethics_approval" INTEGER /* Whether the experiment has received ethics approval */,
  "data_sharing_policy" TEXT /* Policy regarding data sharing with external entities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the participant is part of */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "session" INTEGER /* Session number of the participant */,
  "consent_form" INTEGER /* Whether the participant has signed a consent form */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the participant */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Any relevant medical history of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* The highest level of education completed by the participant */,
  "native_language" TEXT /* The native language of the participant */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who completed the trial */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the trial belongs to */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the trial (e.g., faceWord_exp) */,
  "word" TEXT /* Word presented in the trial */,
  "img" TEXT /* Image presented in the trial */,
  "word_trigger" INTEGER /* Trigger for the word presentation */,
  "img_trigger" INTEGER /* Trigger for the image presentation */,
  "pause_trigger" INTEGER /* Trigger for the pause */,
  "delay_frames_before" INTEGER /* Delay before the word presentation */,
  "delay_frames_after" INTEGER /* Delay after the word presentation */,
  "duration_measured_word" REAL /* Measured duration of the word presentation */,
  "duration_measured_img" REAL /* Measured duration of the image presentation */,
  "trial_status" TEXT /* Status of the trial (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "trial_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the trial */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the trial was conducted */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data collected during the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the response belongs to */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who made the response */,
  "key_t" REAL /* Time of the response */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response made by the participant */,
  "response_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the response (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  "response_confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level of the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "words" (
  "word_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each word */,
  "word" TEXT /* Word */,
  "word_label" TEXT /* Label of the word (e.g., neu, pos, neg) */,
  "word_score_pc" REAL /* PC score of the word */,
  "word_score_warriner" REAL /* Warriner score of the word */,
  "word_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the word in common usage */,
  "word_length" INTEGER /* Length of the word in characters */,
  "word_complexity" TEXT /* Complexity of the word */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "image" TEXT /* Image */,
  "onset_img" REAL /* Onset time of the image */,
  "offset_img" REAL /* Offset time of the image */,
  "image_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the image */,
  "image_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image */,
  "image_size" TEXT /* Size of the image file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition (e.g., faceWord_exp) */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the condition */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of condition (e.g., behavioral, physiological) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user within the institution */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial analyzed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., behavioral, physiological) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was conducted */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis */,
  "analysis_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the analysis */,
  "analysis_confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level of the analysis results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)
